text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Agnes Tachyon brings me to a certain
place...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Wow! It's a beautiful day, isn't it? Well then, let's
get started!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I thought we'd do an experiment here today.
Don't worry, it won't be difficult.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
First, show me your limits. That's where the real
experiment begins.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'll slow down to your pace and run alongside you,
so try to go as fast as you can!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I run along the beach according to Agnes
Tachyon's instructions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One hour passes... Then another... My body gets
heavier and heavier as my feet crash into the sand
with each step.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After hearing Agnes Tachyon's voice from behind
me, I look down at my feet. There I see...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...A sea urchin?! It's too late, I can't avoid it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I open my eyes to find the urchin is right next to
me. It seems Agnes Tachyon had pulled me away
just in time.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Geez! You're quite the hazard. I need you to
refrain from getting injured outside of
experiments.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You owe me now! It happened so quickly, my
heart rate skyrocketed...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The feeling in that moment... Perhaps it'll be
useful for the body modification I'm currently
researching...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh! Nice work, Trainer! Let's hurry back to
the laboratory!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I must make a record of that moment before I
forget!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon seems to have gained something
from her spur-of-the-moment action. Her running
improves significantly from that day!
